productDisplayName: Red Tape Men's Black Casual Shoe
description: Take casual dressing to the next level with these nubuck shoes from red tape. Stylish to the hilt and an absolute comfort to the feet, it's a perfect addition to your wardrobe for those days at the lounge. Team this with chinos and simple shirts for that cool, casual look.Upper Complete nubuck upper for that stylish look and comfort feel Long tongue for easy wear Rugged stitch detailing for style and durability Brand badge on lateral ankle Long collar for comfortable insertion and removal of foot Midsole PU midsole for lightweight comfort and impact protection Complete inner fabric lining for breathable comfort Fabric footbed with leather wings on the back foot for all-day comfort and sweat protection Brand badge on the heel Outsole Durable rubber outsole with textured lugs along the medial side and toe region, with terraced lugs on the lateral side and pivot points on the forefoot and heel for maximum grip, traction and easy movement of the foot shoe careUse a suede brush to dust suede surfaceDo not store in direct sunlight
